aesthetic: raw wood grain, oak and smoke and a big fat toke
composition_rules: Generous negative space — never crowd the frame
Color palette stays within the brand range
people_policy: Faces are optional. When a person appears, they may be partial — hands, silhouette, or gesture.

video.motion: Gentle parallax, slow zoom. No quick pans.
video.text_overlays: Sparse. Single words or short phrases.
